titleStmt.title: SII 28.130: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 130. (A.R. No. 285 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal order approving the gift of 8 mā of land of the kollai grade in Koyilipūṇḍi, a piḍāgai of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr in Rājādhirājavaḷanāḍu, after purchasing the same by Ambāruvandai-arayaṉ Tiruvalañchuḻi uḍaiyān alias Vāṇādhirājaṉ, Ambār in Ambar-nāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu, to raise two flower-gardens named Tiruvalañchuḻi-uḍaiyāntirunandavāṉam and Muttikku-nāyakaṉ-tirunandavaṉam respectively to supply flowers to God Āḷuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār and goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya-periya-nāchchiyār. Four persons were to tend the gardens each of whom was to supply one kuṟuṇi, 4 nāḻī of flowers daily, two to the tiruppūmaṇṭapam of the God and two to the shrine of the goddess. For the maintenance (ilakkai and koṟṟu) of those tending the gardens the same donor further purchased and allotted 13 mā and 3 kāṇi of cultivated land in the same ūr. They were to pay the ūr-māvīnda-kaḍamai and kuḍimai in respect of that land and appropriate the residue of the yield (iṟaimiguḍi). These gifts made by the said donor were to be entered in the tiru-kkaioṭṭi and were to be added to the income (pala-varavai) (of the temple ?). At the donor's request, the record was also permitted to the inscribed in the tirumāḷigai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§svastiśrīḥ § tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟeḻu tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum
teṉṉavaṉ piramamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumā
ḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉa paṭiu Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periya nācciyārkkum tiruppaḷḷi
ttāmamaḷakka Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampāruvantai Arayaṉ tiruvalañcuḻi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa vāṇādhirājaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup
perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai koyilipūṇṭiyile Eṭṭumānilam kollai vilai koṇṭu tiruvalañcuḻi Uṭaiyāṉ tirunantavaṉamum muttikku nāyakaṉ tirunanta
vaṉamum Eṉṉum perāl Iraṇṭu tirunantavaṉañ ceytu Itu ceykiṟa Āḷ nālukkum Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka Aḷakkakkaṭava tiruppaḷḷittā
mattile Iraṇṭāḷukkut tiruppaḷḷittāmam Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tiruppūmaṇṭapattilum Iraṇṭāḷukkut tiruppaḷḷittāmam tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya
periya nācciyār koyililum Aḷakkavum Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattu Ittirunantavaṉam ceykiṟa Āḷukku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Ivvūr viḷainilattilum
taramili nilattilumāka Araiye muṉṟumā mukkāṇi nilam vilaikoṇṭu Iṉṉilattukku Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟuttu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu cantirā
tittavarai Aḷakkak kaṭavatākavum kuṭuttu Aḷantuvārā niṉṟateṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷiṭṭa tiṭṭum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷil sādhaṉaṅkaḷāy Ivaṉ tantavaiyum
tirukkaioṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ pala varavaiyuṭaṉe kūṭṭavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivaṉ namakku
ccoṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻuttu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai mīṉavaṉmuventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi
tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉārivai cetirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai viḻuppādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Ivai vāṇādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyumpaṭiyum perumpaṟṟapuliyūr mulaparuṣaiyār pakkal
Ivūrp piṭākai koyilpūṇṭiyāṉa kṣatryaśikhāmaṇi nallūrppāl śrītirucciṟṟampalavatikkuk kiḻakku rājarājaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ
catirattu tirunantavaṉakkollai rūpāy�m tirunantavaṉappuṟamāṉa ta lāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattut tirunantavaṉakkollai rūpāykham tiruna
ntavaṉappuṟam rūpāykha Orumām kuḷa Opātiyum Āka viḷainilam Araiye kollai nilam Eṭṭu māvum vilaikoṇṭa prāmaṇam muṉṟum Ittirunanta
vaṉakkuṭi kaḻanivāyiluṭaiyāṉ tiruvalañcuḻi Uṭaiyāṉum māṭamuṭaiya m Iṭṭatiṭṭum Oṭukki kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
